items.name: White Helmet with Goggles
items.description: Playing with fire?  I'd suggest goggles.

items.description: Fanatical followers of Dane Half-Wolven, Terror of the High North.

items.name: Earth Day 2010 Cap
items.description: Save the planet!

items.name: Naval Brigade
items.description: Ship to shore, they're your men for sure!

items.name: Frog Beanie
items.description: Ribbit! Stay slimy* in this frog cap. *Cap will not actually make you slimy.

items.name: 1st Day of School Baseball Cap
items.description: The dreaded day is here.... celebrate with this cap!

items.name: Biohazard Cap
items.description: My brain is a toxic wasteland.

items.name: Rockstar Guitar Baseball Cap
items.description: "If it's illegal to rock and roll, throw my butt in jail!"

items.name: Jester's Cap
items.description: Entertain your friends and make a fool of yourself (literally, ha!) with this hat. Why does it cost so much?

items.name: Malachite Rock Helmet
items.description: Made from a cursed stone, many have perished from owning this powerful crown; feel lucky for surviving.

items.name: TH Monogram Hat
items.description:
The new mark of distinction. Inspired by our heritage, but designed for tomorrow — our Monogram is a modern take on a time-honoured icon. The all-over jacquard monogram features a stitched outline that adds a soft, slightly quilted texture to this classic bucket hat. 

This is a collectable item. 

First drop available on 9-11-22 from 7:30 pm EDT until 9:30 pm EDT Second drop available on 9-12-22 from 4:30 pm UTC until 6:30 pm UTC.

items.name: Red Monster League Baseball Cap
items.description: You ain't in the sticks no more. This is the big time. Monster League Baseball.

items.name: Crimson Warlord
items.description: His temper is as sharp as the horns on his helmet.  Sadly, his wit is not.

items.name: Gentlemen of Stratus
items.description: The fine citizens of the upper atmosphere wear clothing fashioned of clouds, including this strikingly light and dapper Top Hat.

items.name: Open Mind Cap
items.description: Could it be any clearer?  Your mind is open for business.

items.name: Vans x The North Face Helmet
items.description: The limited edition Vans x The North Face helmet. Hit the park, learn new tricks, and be one of a kind with this collectable

items.name: Toothy Cap
items.description: No one will be able to bite your style in this cap.

items.name: Fall Ball Cap
items.description: It's keeping you warm while you rep your favorite online game!

items.name: Citizen 01
items.description: You have just left your robot town to move to a new town, where the jobs are plentiful and life is great! What town will you move to?

items.name: Bloxy Cola Recycled Aluminum Cap
items.description: It's not a particularly comfortable cap... but it does say I care about the environment a ton - tiny aluminum scratches don't bother me.

items.name: Heavy Iron Helmet
items.description: This helmet looks great with the Iron Armor Package or on its own: www.roblox.com/Iron-Armor-item?id=60475121

items.name: Summer Bowler
items.description: Who are you kidding? It's freaking hot out. This bowler is unnecessary.

items.name: Tailflipped Hat
items.description: Flip your board, not your lid.

items.name: Omega Rainbow Helmet
items.description: In the end light is all that's left.

items.name: Army Cap
items.description: The guys name was actually Major Major Major, and so the commanding officer decided to promote him to Major (so he was Major Major Major Major). Then he did such an outstanding job he was going to promote him again, but the army wouldn't let him since he was the only Major Major Major Major the Army had...

items.name: Candy Cane Cap
items.description: Stay minty fresh in this cool candy cane cap.
